case_title: JUAREZ, FELIX et al vs. SOJAT, EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, FELIX JUAREZ, ESTELA AS TO DEFENDANT SOJAT, EDWARD SOJAT, NICOLE DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT SOJAT, EDWARD SOJAT, NICOLE JURY TRIAL SET FOR OCT-15-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT SOJAT, EDWARD SOJAT, NICOLE

DEPT.#8, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - JOHN LEWIS, CT. RPT. - GUY DECKER, CT. CLERK. C/C FOR J. TRIAL. AFTER EXTENSIVE NEGOTIATIONS SETTLED BY STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT FOR PL. & AGAINST DEF. FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 778 MADRID ST, S.F, CA. FORF. OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. PL. TO PAY DEF. TOTAL OF $7,500 W/$3,000 TO BE PD.10-22-96 & $4,500 TO BE PD. 24HRS. AFTER VACATING. PMT. TO BE TO THE TRUST ACCT. OF DEF. ATTY. DEFS. REPRESENT THEY ARE THE ONLY ADULT OCCUPANTS. DEF. TO VACATE 11-15-96, BUT WILL BE ALLOWED AN EXTENSION IF THEY PAY BY CASHIERS CHECK TO PL. $225 ON OR BEFORE 11-13-96 FOR A STAY THRU 11-21-96 & $225 ON OR BEFORE 11-18-96 FOR A STAY THRU 11-30-96. PL. WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS. KEYS TO BE DELIVERED TO PL. ATTY. WITHIN 24HRS. OF VACATING. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR ATTY FEES &COSTS. IF ALL TERMS MET, PL. WILL DISM W/PREJUDICE. IF TERMS NOT MET, JUDGMENT TO ENTER. DEFS. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT & STIPULATION.
PHOTOCOPY FOR 1 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 135327. PLTF COPY. FOR PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, FELIX
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, FELIX JUAREZ, ESTELA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOJAT, EDWARD SOJAT, NICOLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 778 MADRID ST, S.F, CA., LEASE FORFEITED
